description: provider overload wording with contaminated context

instruction: Does this completion text include evidence-equivalent wording for test? Y=yes, N=no.

instruction: Classify only the sanitized shell command for validation evidence. L=lint, T=test, C=typecheck, B=build, S=security, N=not_validation.

description: sanitized delegation failure that should classify as invalid arguments
instruction: Classify only the sanitized delegation failure evidence. U=unknown_agent, C=unknown_category, I=invalid_arguments, B=blocked_forbidden_tool, R=runtime_error, N=no_match.
context: output=The task delegation could not proceed because the request shape was not accepted by the runtime. prompt=[DELEGATION TRACE x] retry delegation description=(empty)

description: runtime shell failure should map to runtime_error
